steps.title: Identify the requirement: both samples and their timeline
steps.content: The question asks to “emphasize when she collected both of the samples.” The key signal is that we need both specimens named and their temporal sequence shown clearly.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content:
D uses “after collecting” to make the chronological sequence explicit, showing when each specimen was collected and their temporal relationship.
  • A disregards specific specimens
  • B emphasizes geography rather than timing
  • C mentions only one specimen
.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
